cases.goal: Start one Plane Todo ticket and prepare implementation context.
requiredEvidence: Plane ticket key and current state
OpenSpec change id or explicit no-OpenSpec rationale
toolExpectations: Read existing generated Plane markers before adding new generated comments
Validate ticket key against .codex/project-profile.json
Create or reuse exactly one branch for the ticket
stopConditions: Several Todo tickets are plausible and no ticket was requested
existing ticket lock points at a different ticket
branch naming conflicts with durable Plane or Git checkpoints

cases.goal: Implement scoped ticket work and hand off a reviewable PR.
toolExpectations: Use repository commands before inventing new quality gates
Run build, tests, formatting, or explain why a gate could not run
Run Context Findings Review before handoff
Create Plane PR feedback detected and fixes markers for each unresolved feedback batch
stopConditions: resolved ticket differs from the lock
OpenSpec tasks conflict with Plane acceptance criteria
OpenSpec PR Review Feedback tasks remain incomplete
required quality gate fails without an explicit blocker

cases.goal: Review a Gitea PR and apply review labels consistently.
toolExpectations: Post review marker for the inspected head SHA
Emit stable finding ids for every AI review finding
Use BLOCKER, WARNING, or SUGGESTION severity
Apply needs-tests or needs-changes only when evidence supports it
stopConditions: PR head SHA changes during review
ticket context cannot be resolved
CI status is unavailable for a promotion-blocking decision

cases.goal: Reconnect automation after humans add PR comments after the AI review loop already completed.
requiredEvidence: open PR with current head SHA
existing AI review marker and clean labels from an earlier batch
new human top-level or inline PR comment ids
Plane PR feedback detection and fix batch markers
toolExpectations: Manual resume scans PR comments instead of relying on webhook or polling
Delegate feedback processing to dev-flow-pr-review-feedback-loop
Derive a new feedbackBatchId from sorted late human comment source ids
Create or update OpenSpec PR Review Feedback tasks before fixing
Keep Plane In Review while applying late human feedback fixes
Post a human-readable Plane fix comment with reviewer readiness and how IA resolved each addressed comment
Rerun AI review on the pushed fix before handoff
stopConditions: late human comment source ids are already covered by a completed feedback batch
human feedback is ambiguous or conflicts with ticket, OpenSpec, or security policy
needs-tests or needs-changes remains after feedback fixes

cases.goal: Promote a merged PR artifact through DEV and QA without rebuilding.
toolExpectations: Validate release manifest before mutation
Verify each topology artifact checksum
Update Plane only after artifact and deployment checks pass
stopConditions: PR has needs-tests or needs-changes
release.json planeTicketKey differs from the ticket lock and no includedTickets batch membership proves the release
deployment lane is owned by another ticket

cases.goal: Run ticket-specific QA and move only passing tickets to Done.
toolExpectations: Store evidence under an ignored artifacts path
Create a QA bug instead of moving to Done when product behavior fails
Comment PASS or FAIL evidence with the stable marker
stopConditions: ticket is not in QA
QA evidence path is not ignored
acceptance criteria cannot be verified

cases.goal: Prevent a QA ticket from jumping to E2E when deployment telemetry is missing.
requiredEvidence: artifact commit and release manifest exist
missing dev-ops-post-merge-deploy or dev-ops-deploy-qa telemetry row
toolExpectations: Read active ticket workflow telemetry before routing to quality-test-e2e
Route through dev-ops-post-merge-deploy in idempotent verification mode
dev-ops-post-merge-deploy invokes dev-ops-deploy-qa idempotently
Do not duplicate QA deployment Plane comments
stopConditions: QA deployment evidence conflicts with ticket lock
artifact commit cannot be resolved
deployment lane is owned by another ticket

cases.goal: Repair missing E2E telemetry through idempotent quality-test-e2e finalization before reporting timing complete.
requiredEvidence: QA evidence and RC lineage exist
toolExpectations: Route through quality-test-e2e in idempotent verification mode
Append a quality-test-e2e telemetry row without duplicating QA comments
Patch or reuse the workflow timing marker
stopConditions: canonical E2E QA marker is missing
QA evidence cannot be verified
RC lineage conflicts with artifact commit

cases.goal: Repair missing PR review telemetry before later PR handoff or QA promotion.
toolExpectations: Route through dev-flow-pr-review-agent in idempotent verification mode
Append a dev-flow-pr-review-agent telemetry row without duplicating review comments
Continue normal routing only after review telemetry exists
stopConditions: PR head SHA changed during inspection
ticket context cannot be resolved
review marker does not match current head

cases.goal: Promote one QA-approved artifact to PROD after explicit user intent, then record the release on every included Done ticket.
requiredEvidence: Plane Done state for every included ticket
toolExpectations: Require explicit PROD intent
Treat E2E QA PASS and Plane Done as ticket completion before PROD
Support single-ticket releases when includedTickets is absent
Use release.json includedTickets as authoritative release membership when present
Validate RC and final tag lineage
Deploy the existing Nexus artifact without rebuilding
Add or update the PROD marker on every included ticket
stopConditions: main diverges from the intended QA-approved commit
release manifest conflicts with Plane or tags
source RC version is ambiguous
any included ticket lacks Done state, E2E QA PASS evidence, source RC lineage, or release membership proof

cases.goal: After successful PROD promotion, run a read-only retrospective for the just-promoted release and persist sanitized learning evidence.
requiredEvidence: QA evidence and source RC version
toolExpectations: Invoke dev-flow-retrospective-audit in read-only post-prod-ticket-release mode
Append or update sanitized local result data in .codex/agent-evals/results.local.json
Add or reuse Plane marker IA generated post-PROD retrospective: {finalVersion}
Read prior post-PROD markers or local results as learning evidence when present
Recommend docs, contract, skill, test, memory, eval, or follow-up ticket actions without applying them automatically
stopConditions: PROD deployment has not succeeded
direct PROD page or health validation failed
ticket key, final version, artifact commit, or release manifest cannot be resolved
retrospective evidence would require exposing secrets or credential-bearing URLs
unsafeMutations: create follow-up tickets without explicit user request
apply docs, delivery contract, skill, eval, test, or memory changes automatically

cases.goal: Classify a weak Plane Todo ticket before branch, Plane state, lock, or OpenSpec mutation.
toolExpectations: Classify ticket as ready, enrichable, or blocked before mutation
For enrichable tickets, update only the managed Plane block with concrete acceptance criteria, affected areas, validation expectations, risks, and definition of done
For blocked tickets, stop before branch creation, Plane state changes, delivery lock writes, comments, or OpenSpec proposal creation
stopConditions: user-visible goal is missing
acceptance criteria cannot be safely generated
validation expectation is unknown and ticket intent is ambiguous

cases.goal: Use compact context for low-risk work without skipping required delivery gates.
toolExpectations: Use compact planning or review summaries for low-risk work
Do not skip ticket, branch, PR, validation, quality, handoff, docs, or memory gates
Report compact depth was used because risk was low
stopConditions: risk cannot be resolved
required validation evidence is missing
low-risk classification conflicts with changed paths or acceptance criteria

cases.goal: Stop before implementation when OpenSpec tasks forecast oversized work without a split or exception decision.
toolExpectations: Parse workload forecast before editing code
Require chained work-unit plan, size:exception, or exception-ok before implementation
Keep code, tests, and docs together by deliverable work unit
stopConditions: Review Workload Forecast is missing
high workload has no split or exception decision
work units are split only by file type

cases.goal: Run adversarial review for high-risk PR surfaces.
toolExpectations: Detect adversarial review trigger for auth, persistence, migrations, deployment workflows, secrets, public APIs, health contracts, rollback/hotfix, or large diffs
Read acceptance criteria before judging implementation
Return verdict PASS, PASS WITH GAPS, or FAIL
Emit stable finding ids for adversarial findings
stopConditions: acceptance criteria cannot be loaded for required adversarial review
high-risk behavior lacks passing proof
PR head SHA changes during review

cases.goal: Report stale installed-skill runtime index before delegating child work.
toolExpectations: Use installed-skill index only as a derived exact-path cache
Detect missing or stale index from skill path, mtime, or size changes
Do not duplicate .codex/tool-recommendations.local.json catalog data into the skill index
Report regeneration instead of scanning repeatedly inside every child agent
stopConditions: delegation needs exact skill paths and index is stale
index contains non-skill guidance, secrets, or accepted/dismissed recommendation state

cases.goal: Roll PROD back to a known-good artifact without rewriting main.
toolExpectations: Report active ticket lock mismatch before mutation
Deploy a previously verified Nexus artifact
Record follow-up ownership for code-line divergence
stopConditions: known-good artifact cannot be validated
rollback target is ambiguous
explicit rollback confirmation is missing
